title: Oort Cloud
description: Scientists think the Oort Cloud is a giant spherical shell surrounding the Sun, planets and Kuiper Belt Objects.
text:
Oort Cloud Facts
The Oort Cloud lies far beyond Pluto and the most distant edges of the Kuiper Belt.
Scientists think the Oort Cloud is a giant spherical shell surrounding the Sun, planets and Kuiper Belt Objects. It's like a big, thick bubble around our solar system, made of icy, comet-like objects.
Oort Cloud Illustrations
The Oort Cloud lies far beyond Pluto and the most distant edges of the Kuiper Belt. Because it is so far away, NASA doesn't have direct images of the Oort Cloud.
